workflow.desc: Match user requirement text against business knowledge base features

field.name: features_files
field.desc: Array of paths to features-*.json files

block.field: This skill is READ-ONLY - do not modify any files
Skip unreadable files - continue processing others

sequence.name: Module Matching
sequence.desc: Match requirement to knowledge base modules

block.field: - Tokenize: Split text into words/phrases - Extract entities: Identify nouns, technical terms, business concepts - Normalize: Convert to lowercase, handle Chinese/English mixed text - Build keyword list: Create array of searchable terms
- Use character-level matching for Chinese terms - Consider common abbreviations (e.g., "用户" matches "user") - Support both simplified and traditional characters
- platformId - platformType - modules (grouped by module name) - features (with fileName, sourcePath)

FOR each platform IN platforms: FOR each module IN platform.modules: score = 0 matching_features = []
FOR each keyword IN keywords: IF keyword matches module.name THEN score += 3 // high confidence boost END IF
FOR each feature IN module.features: IF keyword matches feature.fileName THEN score += 1 matching_features.add(feature) END IF END FOR END FOR
IF score > 0 THEN confidence = calculate_confidence(score, keyword_count) matched_modules.add(module with confidence) END IF END FOR END FOR
- high: Direct keyword match with module name or feature fileName - medium: Partial match or synonym match - low: Related concept match only
- Sort matched modules by confidence (high → medium → low) - Generate recommendation text based on top matches - Collect unmatched keywords for user awareness
- High confidence: "Module '{name}' is highly relevant for this requirement" - Medium confidence: "Module '{name}' may be relevant" - Low confidence: "Module '{name}' has partial relevance"

field.name: matched_modules
field.desc: List of matched modules with confidence

field.name: unmatched_keywords
field.desc: Keywords that didn't match any module

field.name: recommendation
field.desc: Suggested modules based on requirement analysis
